issues.description: Rest action is mandatory in DSL but card text says 'You may rest' — should be optional/conditional
Missing condition: LeaderHasType 'Dressrosa' — card effect only triggers if Leader has this type
KO action target scope incorrect — should use 'OpponentCharacter' (not 'ChooseOpponentCharacter') and include cost filter as condition, not as action parameter
TrashFromHand is wrong — card says 'trash 2 cards from the top of your deck', should be TrashFromTopOfDeck or similar deck action, not hand discard
Filter object is empty — should specify 'fromTop' or equivalent to indicate top-of-deck trash mechanic
